name: Steamed Fish and Vegetables in Stove-Top Papi
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless pieces of halibut (6 to 8 ounces -- 3/4-inch thick each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear off two large pieces of plastic wrap, each large enough to enclose the fish and vegetables in a single layer.
2. Rub lemon juice on both sides of the halibut.
3. Layer half cup of blanched sugar snap peas on the bottom of one piece of plastic wrap and drizzle with a teaspoon of olive oil.
4. Place the fish over the peas and bring up the plastic wrap to totally enclose the fish.
5. Set a cake rack over simmering water in a deep skillet. Turn the fish packages upside down so the peas are on top. Layer them on the cake rack and cover with a round bowl or cover to trap steam.
6. Cook for 5 minutes, or until the fish and vegetables are cooked through.
7. While the fish is steaming, remove tomato seeds with a spoon and cut into a fine dice. Toss the diced tomatoes with a bit of olive oil, salt, and pepper and place on dinner plates.
8. When the fish is done, carefully open the plastic package using scissors (watch for your hands). Place the fish and vegetables over the tomatoes and drizzle with juices. Season with salt and pepper and garnish with basil.
Yield: 2 servings
